meta_title: DPF filter cleaning in Estonia — from €100 | DPFLAB
meta_description: Professional DPF filter cleaning from €100. We restore filter performance, arrange collection and return, and provide a service report.
hero_subtitle: We restore filter performance and help you avoid the cost of buying a replacement
hero_badge_3_text: We can collect your filter and bring it back
why_lead: A blocked DPF filter can cause:
why_footer: We clean the filter thoroughly and restore up to 98% of its flow capacity
process_step_2: We collect the filter or you bring it to us
process_step_5: We return it with a report
pricing_footer: The final price depends on the filter type and condition.
benefits_item_5: A report for every completed job
review_1_text: Fast, thorough and fairly priced. The filter is like new and the car drives completely differently.
review_2_text: We work with DPFLAB regularly. Collection and return are always handled quickly.
review_3_text: Excellent service. They collected the filter, cleaned it and brought it back. Recommended.
contact_subtitle: Answer a few questions so we can understand the job and recommend the next step
contact_success: Thank you. We will review the details and contact you through your preferred channel.
contact_success_next: If it is urgent, call us or send us a WhatsApp message.
contact_valid_vehicle: Enter the vehicle or filter details
contact_valid_privacy: Confirm that you have read the data processing terms
contact_step_1_hint: First, tell us the part type and where it is now.
contact_step_2_hint: These details help us quote the job without unnecessary back-and-forth.
contact_vehicle_placeholder: For example: VW Passat 2018, 2.0 TDI or the part number
contact_symptoms_label: What is happening? Select all that apply
contact_urgency_label: When do you need it resolved?
contact_urgency_consultation: I only need advice for now
contact_step_3_hint: Leave your details and we will reply about this request — no mailing lists.
contact_privacy_suffix: and allow my details to be used to answer this request.
contact_route_waiting: Choose where the filter is and we will show the next step.
contact_route_removed_text: We will arrange delivery or intake of the removed filter and confirm the timing.
contact_route_workshop_text: We will confirm the address and arrange collection and return.
contact_route_installed_text: We will find a nearby workshop to remove and reinstall the filter.
contact_route_unsure_text: We will review the symptoms and advise whether cleaning or diagnostics is needed.
contact_route_note: The final price depends on the filter type and condition.
contact_honeypot: Do not fill in this field
cookie_text: We use essential technologies to operate the site. Analytics and advertising measurement are enabled only with your permission.
privacy_intro: This page explains what data DPFLAB receives when you send a request or contact us, and how we use it.
privacy_controller_title: Who is responsible for the data
privacy_controller_text: The data controller is Motorlab OÜ (DPFLAB brand), Saha-Loo tee 36, Iru, 74206, Estonia. Data enquiries: info@dpflab.ee, +372 5555 5014.
privacy_data_text: Name, phone number, email, preferred contact method, vehicle and filter details, issue description, urgency, message content and request-source data such as UTM parameters and an advertising click identifier.
privacy_purpose_text: We use the data to answer requests, prepare quotes and arrange diagnostics, collection, cleaning and return. The legal basis is taking steps before entering into a contract and performing a contract. We cannot process a request without the necessary contact and technical details.
privacy_analytics_text: Optional analytics and advertising measurement are enabled only after you consent. You can change your choice at any time using the “Cookie settings” link at the bottom of the site.
privacy_recipients_text: Access is limited to DPFLAB staff and necessary providers: Cloudflare for hosting and database services, Resend for service notifications, and Meta if you allow analytics or contact us through a Meta service. A partner workshop receives only the details required for the agreed service.
privacy_retention_text: Ordinary enquiries are kept for no more than 12 months after the last contact unless a longer period is required for a contract, accounting obligations or legal claims.
privacy_rights_text: You may request access, correction, deletion or restriction, object to processing and withdraw consent. Email info@dpflab.ee. You may also complain to the Estonian Data Protection Inspectorate (Andmekaitse Inspektsioon) at aki.ee.
